<text><loc_371><loc_34><loc_456><loc_40>TPS562200, TPS563200</text>
<text><loc_320><loc_40><loc_456><loc_46>SLVSCB0E - JANUARY 2014 - REVISED MAY 2023</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_45><loc_50><loc_454><loc_69>TPS56x200 4.5-V to 17-V Input, 2-A, 3-A Synchronous Step-down Voltage Regulator in 6-Pin SOT-23</section_header_level_1>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_80><loc_95><loc_88>1 Features</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_46><loc_92><loc_213><loc_107>· TPS562200 - 2-A converter with integrated 122-mΩ and 72-mΩ FETs</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_107><loc_240><loc_122>· TPS563200 - 3-A converter with integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_122><loc_215><loc_137>· D-CAP2™ control topology for fast transient response</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_137><loc_188><loc_144>· Input voltage range: 4.5 V to 17 V</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_145><loc_186><loc_152>· Output voltage range: 0.76 V to 7 V</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_152><loc_167><loc_159>· Switching frequency: 650 kHz</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_160><loc_173><loc_167>· Advanced Eco-mode pulse-skip</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_168><loc_197><loc_175>· Low shutdown current less than 10 µA</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_175><loc_195><loc_182>· 1% feedback voltage accuracy (25°C)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_182><loc_200><loc_189>· Start-up from pre-biased output voltage</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_190><loc_172><loc_197>· Cycle-by-cycle overcurrent limit</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_197><loc_200><loc_204>· Hiccup-mode undervoltage protection</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_205><loc_215><loc_212>· Non-latch OVP, UVLO and TSD protections</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_213><loc_134><loc_220>· Fixed soft start: 1 ms</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_220><loc_243><loc_235>· Use TPS563252 for improved efficiency and higher frequency in a smaller package</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_235><loc_234><loc_243>· Create a Custom Design with WEBENCH ® Tools</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_246><loc_113><loc_254>2 Applications</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_46><loc_258><loc_144><loc_265>· Digital TV power supply</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_265><loc_191><loc_272>· High definition Blu-ray Disc™ players</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_273><loc_153><loc_280>· Networking home terminal</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_280><loc_150><loc_287>· Digital Set Top Box (STB)</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<picture><loc_74><loc_303><loc_222><loc_337><caption><loc_130><loc_341><loc_222><loc_346>Copyright © 2016, Texas Instruments Incorporated</caption></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_107><loc_347><loc_189><loc_354>Simplified Schematic</section_header_level_1>
<picture><loc_46><loc_470><loc_63><loc_481></picture>
<page_footer><loc_64><loc_471><loc_441><loc_482>An IMPORTANT NOTICE at the end of this data sheet addresses availability, warranty, changes, use in safety-critical applications, intellectual property matters and other important disclaimers. PRODUCTION DATA.</page_footer>
<section_header_level_1><loc_257><loc_80><loc_320><loc_88>3 Description</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_257><loc_92><loc_454><loc_114>The TPS562200 and TPS563200 are simple, easyto-use, 2-A and 3-A synchronous step-down (buck) converters in 6-pin SOT-23 package.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_118><loc_454><loc_140>The devices are optimized to operate with minimum external component counts and also optimized to achieve low standby current.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_144><loc_454><loc_197>These switch mode power supply (SMPS) devices employ D-CAP2 control topology providing a fast transient response and supporting both low equivalent series resistance (ESR) output capacitors such as specialty polymer and ultra-low ESR ceramic capacitors with no external compensation components.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_201><loc_454><loc_239>TPS562200 and TPS563200 operate in Advanced Eco-mode, which maintains high efficiency during light load operation. The devices are available in a 6-pin 1.6-mm × 2.9-mm SOT (DDC) package, and specified from -40°C to 85°C of ambient temperature.</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_315><loc_243><loc_396><loc_250>Device Information (1)</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_257><loc_250><loc_454><loc_283><fcel>PART NUMBER<fcel>Output Current  (Max)<fcel>Package<nl><fcel>TPS562200<fcel>2 A<fcel>DRL (SOT-236, 6)<nl><fcel>TPS563200<fcel>3 A<ucel><nl></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_257><loc_288><loc_445><loc_300>(1) For all available packages, see the orderable addendum at the end of the data sheet.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<picture><loc_258><loc_305><loc_436><loc_399><caption><loc_310><loc_401><loc_393><loc_408>Tps562200 Efficiency</caption></picture>
</doctag>
